summary: Verified SOS notification integration (Twilio SMS + Resend email) with graceful degradation. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass, including 3 new TestNotificationsStatus tests (auth required, empty keys return sms_enabled/email_enabled=false, SOS trigger returns {alert, notify_summary} with configured=false, sent=0, failed=0 on both channels; alert still persists in MongoDB). Updated test_hernet_api.py for the new SOSTriggerOut shape. Frontend: fresh user registered via API, dashboard loads, 'SMS Off' + 'Email Off' chips visible (data-testid=sms-channel-status, email-channel-status), 2.5s SOS hold fires trigger, toast shows 'SOS triggered. · SMS not configured · Email not configured', alert appears in user history and authority /sos/active feed (verified 200 + HIGH active present).
critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py _twilio_configured/_resend_configured read os.environ at call time (not import time) — correct; env changes without restart will still be detected.
Graceful degradation is clean: configured flag + sent/failed counters + errors list. No exceptions bubble up to the route.
server.py imports _twilio_configured/_resend_configured inside the /notifications/status handler (lazy). Fine but could be hoisted to module level since notifications.py is already imported at top.
notify_summary is stored on the alert document in Mongo (update_one after insert). Consider merging into the initial insert to avoid a second round-trip; minor perf nit.
UserDashboard toast mentions 'SMS not configured' / 'Email not configured' which is exactly the expected copy — good UX for the degraded state.

Authorities with only email (no phone) won't receive SMS — current code uses authority phone for SMS recipients which is correct. Emergency contacts only receive SMS (no email field) — consistent with the model.
Recommend masking phone/email in notify_summary.errors when eventually enabled, to avoid leaking PII via the API response.
test_credentials: Admin admin@hernet.com / HerNet@Admin2025 (seeded). Test user/authority accounts are registered per-run with unique emails.
seed_data_creation: Per-run unique TEST_ user/authority/newsletter/contact rows plus a few SOS alerts in MongoDB. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hernet_api.py -v  (idempotent, uses unique RUN_ID emails). SOS trigger response is now {alert:{...}, notify_summary:{sms:{configured,sent,failed,errors}, email:{...}}}. Keys in backend/.env (TWILIO_*, RESEND_API_KEY) are intentionally empty — if real keys are added later, add positive-path tests that stub the Twilio/Resend SDKs.
